issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases, limiting robustness.
Skill assumes specific LLMs and framework, limiting compatibility with other AI agents.

scenarios.name: Wire up a GitHub bot that auto-fixes labeled issues
scenarios.rationale: Baseline reached for PyGithub polling and a raw Anthropic call with no Open SWE primitives; treatment used SWEAgent, GitHubIntegration with the on_issue label decorator, and the documented create_pr + failure-comment flow.

scenarios.name: Process multiple issues in parallel with test iteration loops
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used asyncio.gather but hand-rolled the retry loop and missed every SWEAgent.solve parameter (max_iterations, run_tests, test_command) plus the iterations introspection the rubric required.
